name: radio-group
description: An accessible radio button group; role=radiogroup/radio, aria-checked, roving tabindex, arrow-key navigation (WAI-ARIA APG radio group pattern).
docs: Register <lv-radio-group> by importing components/ui/radio-group.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as an array of { value, label, disabled? }, `value` for the selected option, and `label` for the group name. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the selected value string.
